summary: Decent performance with several standout gems despite an unremarkable setlist; recording quality not specified.
review: The show offers a handful of memorable moments—Row Jimmy, Picasso Moon, Samson and Delilah, TWBS, and especially Days Between—though the overall setlist is considered only average. Reviewers enjoyed the concert but note that better shows exist from this run through The Garden. No comments were made about the recording source or sound quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rated review; it highlights a few strong songs but calls the setlist unremarkable and gives no recording details, leading to an average overall score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments on sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer felt the setlist was not stellar compared to other shows on the same tour, but noted several gems that stood out.
